---
title: "Vignette - json"
id: vignette_json
author: brad_cannell
date: 2026-01-31
date-modified: 2026-01-31
audience: developers
category: vignette
tags:
  - vs_code
  - positron
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Overview

- This vignette is about using json in Positron.
- This could be helpful for many things, including saving and loading AI chat objects.
- Can/should I save turns as a json object?
